official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the award_stats packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the award_stats body.
Official binary source for the per-entry stat key and stat value codecs inside the stats map.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official constructor and STREAM_CODEC with an empty Object2IntOpenHashMap<Stat<?>>, then re-encodes through the official Play clientbound protocol codec. Because the map has zero entries, this does not require initialized Minecraft/game state or stat registry entries.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound award_stats packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official empty-stats fixture only; do not infer non-empty Stat registry entry decoding, stat semantics, UI/stat screen behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
